prompt: Create a widescreen cinematic science-fiction concept art scene in a bleak monochrome palette. The setting is the colossal interior wreckage of a destroyed futuristic megastructure or crashed spacecraft, viewed from a low ground-level perspective under an enormous dark ceiling slab that dominates the top two-thirds of the frame. Show one lone female figure standing slightly right of center in the distance, small against the architecture, with long black hair, pale skin, and a flowing dark-and-white layered outfit or coat, giving a quiet post-apocalyptic heroine mood. Surround her with shattered metal plates, collapsed floor debris, hanging cables, jagged beams, and broken hull fragments; include three massive curved structural ribs receding into the bright misty opening behind her. Strong backlight floods in from the left and rear, creating a white foggy exterior glow and deep silhouettes in the foreground. Use dramatic scale contrast, sharp angular sci-fi industrial forms, subtle dust haze, high detail, matte-painting realism, cold gray and black tones, no text, no watermark. Aspect ratio 16:9. Optional customization: the lone character is an unnamed dark-haired woman, the environment is a crashed alien megastructure, the mood is bleak post-apocalyptic solitude, the color palette is cold monochrome gray and black, and the lighting is harsh white backlight through fog.
promptEn: Create a widescreen cinematic science-fiction concept art scene in a bleak monochrome palette. The setting is the colossal interior wreckage of a destroyed futuristic megastructure or crashed spacecraft, viewed from a low ground-level perspective under an enormous dark ceiling slab that dominates the top two-thirds of the frame. Show one lone female figure standing slightly right of center in the distance, small against the architecture, with long black hair, pale skin, and a flowing dark-and-white layered outfit or coat, giving a quiet post-apocalyptic heroine mood. Surround her with shattered metal plates, collapsed floor debris, hanging cables, jagged beams, and broken hull fragments; include three massive curved structural ribs receding into the bright misty opening behind her. Strong backlight floods in from the left and rear, creating a white foggy exterior glow and deep silhouettes in the foreground. Use dramatic scale contrast, sharp angular sci-fi industrial forms, subtle dust haze, high detail, matte-painting realism, cold gray and black tones, no text, no watermark. Aspect ratio 16:9. promptZh: 创作一个电影级宽屏科幻概念艺术场景，背景为黑暗、废弃的巨型结构内部。画布比例为 16:9，采用低角度大广角构图，上方是巨大的坍塌黑色金属天花板，锯齿状的建筑残骸形成了对角线剪影。在右下三分之一处，放置一个孤独的女性身影，她留着黑色长发，皮肤苍白，身形纤细，穿着飘逸的黑白叠层长袍或外套；她静静地站在破碎的金属地板上，与宏大的环境相比显得十分渺小，神情平静而神秘，目视前方。场景应呈现出被摧毁的宇宙飞船、轨道空间站或未来城市外壳的内部感：巨大的断裂肋骨、撕裂的面板、悬垂的电缆、弯曲的横梁、破碎的船体板，以及隐没在雾气中的远方结构弧线。利用左侧和角色后方明亮白色开口的强烈背光，营造高对比度、深邃阴影、大气雾霾，以及由黑色、炭灰色、钢灰色和冷白色组成的去饱和单色调。强调角色与环境的无缝融合、史诗般的尺度、电影级构图、逼真的数字绘画质感、锐利的前景剪影、朦胧的纵深感，以及充满末日科幻氛围的意境。无文字，无水印。可选自定义：将孤独的身影设为 女性，留着 黑色 头发，穿着 飘逸的黑白叠层长袍或外套，置身于 被摧毁的宇宙飞船或轨道空间站 中，由 左侧明亮的白色开口 照亮。
